Aluminium Joinery Repairs

This is the broad repair page for single and double glazed aluminium joinery across Wellington. If the job involves a window or door that is worn, loose, leaking, not locking, not sliding, not staying open or generally not operating as it should, it usually lands here.

Common issues

Loose handles, failed locks, bent stays, noisy hinges, worn rollers, failed wedges, rattling sashes, dropped doors and leaking aluminium joinery.

What we do

We diagnose the failed part, source compatible hardware, realign the joinery and repair the actual fault before anyone starts talking about full replacement.

What happens next

Send a photo, suburb and short description. We will usually identify the likely repair path and point you to the right booking slot quickly.

Searches we commonly help with

People usually find this page while searching aluminium joinery repairs, aluminium window repairs, aluminium door repairs, window handle replacement, door handle replacement, window lock repair, Yale window lock repair, ranchslider repairs, awning stay replacement and leaking aluminium windows. It is the catch-all repair page for aluminium joinery that still deserves repair rather than replacement.

Aluminium window repairs Sliding door repairs Handles, locks and wedges Mitre and sill reseals

Get a quote for aluminium joinery repairs

Best for aluminium windows and doors with failed hardware, poor sealing, sticking operation, dropped panels or worn components.

Same-day replies during business hours.

Photos can be sent after we reply.

Wellington, Porirua, Hutt Valley, Petone and Kapiti.

What we repair most often

  • Aluminium window handles, door handles, catches and latches
  • Window locks, Yale window locks, cylinders and sliding door locksets
  • Awning stays, hinges, restrictors and security stays
  • Sliding door rollers, tracks and alignment faults
  • Wedges, seals, sash fitment and early-stage draught or leak faults
  • Older or obsolete joinery hardware that still needs to be kept going

Where we work

We book aluminium joinery repairs across Central Wellington, Porirua, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Petone and Kapiti.

Related repair pages: Window repairs • Sliding door repairs • Lock picking • Draught and leak repairs

Helpful guides

  • Sliding door repair costs in Wellington
  • Do your window stays need replacing?
  • Digital locks in Wellington: Elock, Yale YDM and Doric DE10

Joinery repair FAQs

What is included in aluminium joinery repairs?

We repair aluminium windows and doors including handles, locks, stays, hinges, rollers, wedges, seals, alignment issues and leak-related faults.

Do you work on single and double glazed aluminium joinery?

Yes. We service both single and double glazed aluminium joinery across Wellington, Porirua, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Petone and Kapiti.

Do you replace old or obsolete joinery hardware?

Yes. Where possible we source compatible older hardware, including handles, locks, rollers and wedges for aluminium joinery that is no longer current.
